yyka_backoff_tiny.description: Slightly reclaim the iter2 16/21 micro-up while leaving the lever pair untouched.

yyka_backoff_soft.description: One more notch of 16/21 backoff to test whether xx/max rebounds without giving back yy/Ka_xx too much.

state12_guard_keep_yyka.description: Keep the R56 16/21 repair, but add a tiny iter2 state12 lift to directly suppress the max holder.

state12_guard_tiny_backoff.description: Combine a very small state12 lift with a half-step 16/21 reclaim so xx/max gets help while yy/Ka_xx stays near R56.

state12_guard_keep_yyka_lever_retrim.description: Same state12 micro guard, with a barely smaller post lever pair to see if mean can come back without hurting rx_y/ry_z too much.
